metadata.description: Independent 12-month cohort return analysis by composite structural risk quintile.
metadata.methodology: Rolling monthly cohort formation. Each month, companies ranked by composite structural risk score and assigned to Bottom (lowest 20%), Middle (40th-60th percentile), or Top (highest 20%) quintile. Median 12-month forward return computed independently per formation month. Chart curves use expanding median — not sequential compounding.
metadata.disclaimer: Past structural patterns do not guarantee future outcomes. This describes historical distributional tendencies, not predictions.
